name: hot-overlay-state
description: Hot overlay state uses Svelte 5 $state rune in a .svelte.ts module-level variable with an exported plain object API (hotOverlay). The object spreads _hotFeatures on every mutation to trigger reactivity. File must use .svelte.ts extension for $state runes to work outside components. Tests use @vitest-environment node and import via $lib alias.

title: MeasurementResult canonical = store discriminated union, NOT geo-engine
rationale: Store type carries the 'geometry' field (required for annotation save flow); geo-engine returns raw measurements with flat 'coordinates'. Discriminated union eliminates optional-field errors downstream and removes 'result.coordinates' cast noise in MeasurementPanel.
